basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal)
basic_details.short_information: The latest National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Research Associate I posts. Published on the official website NIT Warangal Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 1 opening for eligible candidates. Applicants up to 35 years of age and possessing a Ph.D. in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent qualification with relevant research/teaching/design experience can apply through email mode till 26 May 2026. Find all details about the NIT Warangal Research Associate I new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, ap

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC and Physically Challenged applicants shall be considered as per the existing Government of India rules. As per norms and guidelines of the funding agency.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent degree, 03 years of research, teaching and design and development experience after ME / MTech in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent degree with at least one research paper in Science Citation Indexed (SCI) journal.
qualification.details: Ph.D. in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent degree. OR Having 03 years of research, teaching and design and development experience after ME / MTech in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent degree with at least one research paper in Science Citation Indexed (SCI) journal.

selection_process: Shortlisting of eligible candidates Interview (online or offline)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Warangal Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Associate - I position at NIT Warangal?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 26th May 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate - I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Electronics and Communication Engineering or an equivalent degree. Alternatively, 03 years of relevant experience after ME/MTech with a research paper in an SCI journal is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate - I position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC and Physically Challenged candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate - I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 58,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Research Associate - I position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate - I position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting eligible candidates followed by an interview, which can be conducted online or offline.

faq.question: Q8. What documents do I need to attach with my application?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with your application.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position, as indicated by the job type. The duration of the contract is not specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can download it from there for detailed information.
